Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Test.Description: The outside temperature sensor has an electrical fault. circuit short to ground. Or Sensor defect
The outside temperature sensor has an electrical fault. Circuit short to battery or open.
The left fuel level sensor has an electrical fault. circuit short to ground.
The left fuel level sensor has an electrical fault. circuit short to battery or open
Cruise Control "On" Signal. circuit short to ground.
Cruise Control "On" Signal. circuit short to battery.
Cruise Control "Set" Signal. circuit short to ground.
Cruise Control "Set" Signal. circuit short to battery.
There is an internal control unit fault in the RAM memory. General Memory Failure.
'There is an internal error in the EEPROM of the control unit.
The control unit ''Alternator'' has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The control unit ''Alternator'' has a malfunction. Internal Electronic Failure.
There is an internal control unit fault in the NVRAM memory.
Upshift Switch Circuit. circuit short to battery.
Downshift Switch Circuit. circuit short to battery.
Four Wheel Drive (4WD) Switch Circuit. circuit short to ground.
Four Wheel Drive (4WD) Switch Circuit. circuit short to battery.
The button "Defrost mode of air conditioning" has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
An internal fault in the hardware of the watchdog function was detected.
An incorrect variant coding or configuration was detected.
The oil level sensor has a short circuit to ground. Circuit short to ground or open.
The oil level sensor has a short circuit to positive. circuit short to battery.
The Coolant Fluid Level Sensor has a malfunction. Circuit short to ground or to battery
Switch ''Brake fluid level'' has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
Park Brake Switch Circuit. circuit short to battery.
The belt buckle "Driver" has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The ''Deactivate front passenger airbag'' switch has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The ''Deactivate front passenger airbag'' switch has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground or Open.
The input and/or output ''Circuit 58D (potentiometer)'' has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The left low beam has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The right low beam has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The actuator motor for the headlamp range adjustment has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The actuator motor for the headlamp range adjustment has a malfunction. Circuit Short To Ground or Open.
The signal line 1 has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The signal line 1 has a malfunction. Circuit short to ground or open.
The signal line 2 has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The signal line 2 has a malfunction. Circuit short to ground or open.
The signal line 3 has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The signal line 3 has a malfunction. Circuit short to ground or open.
The signal line 4 has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The signal line 4 has a malfunction. Circuit short to ground or open.
The signal line 5 has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The signal line 5 has a malfunction. Circuit short to ground or open.
The signal line 6 has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The signal line 7 has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The signal line 8 has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The signal line 9 has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The signal line 10 has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The output for the horn has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The output for the horn has a malfunction. circuit short to ground or open.
The contact switch of the start/stop button has a malfunction. circuit short to ground.
The contact switch of the start/stop button has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The contact switch of the start/stop button has a malfunction. circuit open.
Button "Transmission mode M" is jammed. circuit short to battery.
Button "Transmission mode selection" is jammed. circuit short to battery.
Button ''ESP® OFF'' is jammed. circuit short to ground.
Button ''ESP® OFF'' is jammed. circuit short to battery.
Button ''ESP® OFF'' is jammed. circuit open.
The button ''360° camera'' has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The output for the hazard warning system has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The output for the hazard warning system has a malfunction.Circuit Short To Ground or Open.
Button "Hazard warning system" has a malfunction. circuit short to ground.
Button "Hazard warning system" has a malfunction. Circuit short to battery or open.
Button "Hazard warning system" has a malfunction. Signal Invalid.
The output for button illumination "Hazard warning system" has a malfunction. circuit short to ground.
The output for button illumination "Hazard warning system" has a malfunction. circuit open.
Indicator "Parking system" has a malfunction. circuit short to ground.
Indicator "Parking system" has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
Indicator "Parking system" has a malfunction. circuit open.
The power supply in the system is too low.
The power supply in the system is too high.
The switch ''Exterior lights'' (channel 1) has a malfunction. circuit short to ground.
The switch ''Exterior lights'' (channel 1) has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The switch ''Exterior lights'' (channel 2) has a malfunction. circuit short to ground.
The switch ''Exterior lights'' (channel 2) has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The switch ''Exterior lights'' (channel 3) has a malfunction. circuit short to ground.
The switch ''Exterior lights'' (channel 3) has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The watchdog function has detected an internal hardware fault.
Output 1 for the pump of the windshield washer system has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
Output 1 for the pump of the windshield washer system has a malfunction. circuit short to ground or open.
Fill level sensor "Washer fluid level" has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The function illumination for switch "Theft protection" has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The spray nozzle heater has a malfunction. circuit short to ground.
The spray nozzle heater has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
The spray nozzle heater has a malfunction. circuit open.
Button ''Variable speed limiter'' has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
Button ''Variable speed limiter'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground or open.
Communication with the private CAN bus has a malfunction. Bus Off.
Communication with the chassis CAN bus has a malfunction. Bus Off.
Communication with the user interface CAN bus has a malfunction. Bus Off.
Communication with the control unit ''combustion engine'' has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with control unit "Transmission" has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the transfer case has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with control unit "Fuel pump" has a malfunction. . Missing message.
Communication with control unit ''Drivetrain'' has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the control unit for All Wheel Drive has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with control unit ''Traction system'' has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the tire pressure monitor has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the signal acquisition and actuation module has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the supplemental restraint system (SRS) has a malfunction. Signal invalid.
Communication with the supplemental restraint system (SRS) has a malfunction. Missing message
Communication with the instrument cluster has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with control unit ''Tachograph'' has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the steering column module has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the backup camera has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with "parktronic" has a malfunction. circuit short to ground.
Communication with "parktronic" has a malfunction. circuit short to battery.
Communication with "parktronic" has a malfunction. circuit open.
Communication with "ODS/HLL" has a malfunction.
Communication with the vehicle CAN bus has a malfunction. Bus Off.
Communication with the diagnostic CAN bus has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the diagnostic CAN bus has a malfunction. Bus Off.
Communication with output stage "Differential lock on rear axle" has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the center sensor for function "Active engine hood" has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with the control unit for telematics services has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with control unit ''Radar sensorics'' has a malfunction. Missing message.
Communication with control unit ''360° camera'' has a malfunction. Missing message.
An implausible signal ''Status of circuit 15'' was received.
Control Module Timer/Clock Performance
